basics.name: Annas Ali
basics.label: Senior DevOps Engineer | AWS Certified Professional

work.summary: Architecting serverless ETL infrastructure and orchestration.
highlights: Architecting serverless ETL infrastructure using AWS Glue Crawlers and Amazon Redshift.
Executing seamless data migration strategies to Redshift.
Enhancing system observability with Datadog custom dashboards.
Managing containerized workloads on Kubernetes.
Automated infrastructure using Terraform, Jenkins, and AWS CodeBuild.
Implemented Blue/Green deployment strategies on AWS.
Streamlined containerized application deployments on Amazon ECS.
Optimized CI/CD performance by 40% through Jenkins master-slave architecture.
Proactively monitored application performance using New Relic.
Optimized MSSQL (RDS/EC2) health and performance.

work.summary: Managed multi-cloud infrastructure and DevOps pipelines.
highlights: Configured and managed AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda).
Deployed Docker containers for Node, Next.js, Angular, Flask, PHP, Laravel.
Implemented IaC using Terraform for multi-region deployment.
Designed CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD.
Managed scalable Kubernetes clusters.
Standardized deployment using Helm charts.
Implemented GitOps using ArgoCD and Terraform Cloud.
Managed databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB).
Configured monitoring tools (CloudWatch, Datadog, New Relic).

projects.name: Kubernetes Infrastructure Deployment Standardization
highlights: Orchestrated Amazon EKS clusters using Terraform.
Standardized deployment using Helm Charts and Argo CD.
Utilized Terraform Helm module.
Integrated Pod and Node Autoscalers.
Configured AWS CodePipeline for CI/CD.
Implemented Istio service mesh.
Integrated monitoring (Datadog, ELK) and security (Stackrox).

projects.name: Cross-Account AWS Glue Data Pipeline Implementation
highlights: Orchestrated secure, cross-account data pipeline using Terraform.
Managed S3 buckets for Parquet data.
Configured AWS Glue Crawlers.
Designed AWS Glue ETL jobs.
Implemented IAM policies for cross-account security.

projects.name: Serverless Jenkins Setup on AWS Fargate
highlights: Configured Jenkins on AWS Fargate using Terraform.
Utilized ECS Fargate plugin for build agents.
Achieved operational efficiency with automated scaling.
Enhanced reliability with Route 53, CloudWatch, AWS Backup.

projects.name: Temporary Elevated Access Management (TEAM)
highlights: Integrated Okta with AWS IAM Identity Center.
Configured IAM Identity Center permission sets.
Developed automated workflow for temporary access.
Leveraged Okta for user provisioning and MFA.
Implemented logging with CloudTrail and CloudWatch.

skills: AWS Services (EC2, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, SNS, SQS, Glue)
CI/CD (Jenkins, AWS CodePipeline, GitHub Actions, ArgCD)
Security (WAF, IAM, GuardDuty, KMS, Secrets Manager, Orca)
